productDisplayName: Fila Men Grey & Black Sports Shoes
description: These cushioned and lightweight shoes from fila are designed to offer a comfortable sport experience coupled with style. Team this with jeans and tees to look your sporty best. Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability Reinforced mesh overlay over heel cup for extra support to the back foot Reinforced overlay over toe box for extra support to the fore foot Central laces for durability, with an additional pair Padded and branded tongue for durability Fabric lining for comfort and breathability Cushioned sock liner for in step comfort and snug Fit Branding on side Midsole TPU midsole for lightweight comfort and better shock absorption Cushioned foam footbed for enhanced impact protection and comfort Removable footbed to replace with an orthotic Outsole TPU outsole with terraced grooves on the fore foot and midfoot for superior grip Raised and decuppled heel for abrasion-free comfort shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dust Do not machine wash Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight
